content.en:
"The Endless Lord has broken through?"

"He's only only comprehended five sycamore fire spirit leaves!"

"This ...... I have comprehended more than 3,000 sycamore fire spirit leaves, and I have not broken through so far, the Endless Lord has only come for such a short time, and I have only broken through five sycamore fire spirit leaves, which is too shocking. "

"Maybe the Endless Lord itself is about to break through, and now he has broken through with a little enlightenment, it should be like this. "

No matter what, these Realm Realm Legendary Lords were extremely envious of Ye Tian at the moment, looking forward to having such a day.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Will Rule Realm gradually became the Will Rule Realm.

The realm of volitional rules is far from being compared with the world of volitional rules, which can only control all the rules in the realm, while the realm of volitional rules can be modified and reshaped to a higher level.

The world of will rules can easily crush the field of will rules, where the body goes, where is his heaven and earth, one thought can change everything in that day and place, one thought can change an ordinary place into a treasure land, and modify the rules of that place.

But the biggest role of the will rule heaven and earth is to impact the legendary lord of the transcendent realm and enhance the combat effectiveness, and the others are incidental effects~.

"The rules of the will are there, and as long as the legendary body is condensed, you can break through to the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Comparatively speaking, the Heaven and Earth of the Will Rule are easier to condense, while the condensation of the Legend Body is very difficult.

Many Realm Legendary Lords have condensed the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules, but they have never been able to condense the Legendary Body, and there are quite a few such Legendary Lords, who are called half-step Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords.

Ye Tian had obtained the blood tissue of the supreme legendary body creature, and it was also an active blood tissue, if it was to condense the ordinary legendary body, it would really not be difficult for him.

But he can't look down on ordinary legendary bodies, after all, legendary bodies affect combat effectiveness, and even have an impact on the level of legendary realm lords.

If it is the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, coupled with the Supreme Legendary Body, and all other aspects have also been raised to the Peak Realm, it is really almost invincible.

But he also knew very well that it was extremely difficult to condense the Supreme Legendary Body, and relying on the active blood tissue of the Supreme Legendary Body alone was far from being able to help him condense the Supreme Legendary Body, but only allowed him to have enough understanding of the Supreme Legendary Body.

In the following years, Ye Tian had been studying the Supreme Legend, but his progress was slow and he didn't gain much.

"It seems that you can't do your own research, you have to ask others. "

Ye Tian thought of the Frostless Lord, but the Frostless Lord has now broken through to the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, I don't know if I would like to see him?

But he still has to try.

So, he summoned the Lord of Frost for advice.

Soon after, Lord Frostless replied to Ye Tian and asked him to go to her palace.

There is really no holy place, no frost palace

Ye Tian came here, without any hindrance, and came directly to the palace of the Frostless Lord.

"I've seen Lord Frostless. "

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Lord, your cultivation speed is really fast enough, you have condensed the Will Rule Heaven and Earth so quickly, you won't come this time to ask me for advice on condensing the Legendary Body, right?" said the Frostless Lord with a smile.

"I can't hide it from Lord Frostless, that's exactly what I thought. Ye Tian said truthfully: "I want to condense the Supreme Legend, so I came to consult the Frostless Lord." "

"What, you want to condense the Supreme Legend?"

The Frostless Lord was amazed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Do you know how difficult it is to condense the Supreme Legend?" asked the Frostless Lord.

"I know!" Ye Tian nodded, and immediately took out his share of active blood tissue, "I have a bit of a chance, I got this opportunity at the Gray Mist Stone Statue last time, so I want to try to condense the Supreme Legend." "

He took out this active blood tissue, but he was not afraid of the Frostless Lord's greed, because the Legendary Realm Lord really didn't necessarily look at this thing.

"The blood tissue of the Supreme Legendary Body creature is also active, this should be the work of the Eternal Master, and for the Realm Legendary Lord, it is indeed a priceless treasure," the Frostless Lord commented.

"However, it can't condense the Supreme Legend. "

The Frostless Lord is still not optimistic about Ye Tian, it's not that the value of this blood tissue is not high enough, but no matter how high the value is, it is impossible for Ye Tian to condense the Supreme Legendary Body, because the conditions are insufficient.

"Please also ask the Lord of Frost for advice. "

Ye Tian asked.

The Frostless Lord said slowly, "Do you know that among the many eternal seas in the Void Region, who can condense the Supreme Legendary Body?"

"I don't know. "

Ye Tian shook his head.

"Heirs of the Eternal Masters!" the Frostless Lord revealed, "The Eternal Masters can help their sons condense the Supreme Legends when they attack the Legendary Lords of the Transcendental Realm. Because condensing the Supreme Legendary Body not only requires a sufficient understanding of the Supreme Legendary Body, but also requires three extremely rare materials, which are extremely rare. "

"The first is the River Bead of Time!"

"The second type is Kukai Gravel!"

"The third type is the Ancient Leaf of Time and Space. "

Ye Tian didn't know any of these three treasures, and he hadn't heard much of them.

At this time, the Frostless Lord smiled and said, "Do you want to say that you don't know these three kinds of treasures?" Okay, let me tell you, first of all, the True Saintless Land doesn't have these three treasures, so you can't use the True Saintless Land, even we, the Legendary Realm Lords, don't have it." "

.......

None of the Legendary Realm Lords heard it, and Ye Tian immediately understood the rarity of these three things.

The Frostless Lord began to introduce: "The River Bead of Time comes from the River of Time, the River of Time will not give birth to items, it is full of the power of time, but if the Eternal Controller fights in the River of Time, it is very likely that the power of time in a certain River of Time will be condensed and compressed to produce some kind of qualitative change, and after endless years, it is possible to give birth to the River Bead of Time." "

"As for Kukai Gravel, it was born in Kukai and was born in a similar way to the time river pearl. Time River Pearl, I don't know where there is, but I know where there is empty sea sand and gravel."

Frost-free lord said.

"Where is the time for gravel?" Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

The Frostless Lord said: "The Star Tower, the Star Lord of the Star Tower, he has a special Eternal Arcana. He has fused the Kukai Gravel into the Eternal Treasure Twin Star Arrow. "

Ye Tian nodded secretly, indicating that he understood.

"As for the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space, I only know one name, and I don't know anything else. "

After the frostless lord said this, he asked Ye Tian again: "Knowing the difficulty of condensing the Supreme Legendary Body, do you still want to continue to condense?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Lord Frostless was silent for a moment, and then suggested, "Maybe you go to a place, and you may find these three treasures or their news nine." "_
